name: fast-send-monorepo
description: Simple LAN file and text sharing tool
author: FastSend Team

scripts.build:client: pnpm --filter @fast-send/client build && (if exist packages\server-go\dist (rmdir /s /q packages\server-go\dist)) && xcopy /e /i /y packages\client\dist packages\server-go\dist
scripts.build:upx: echo 'UPX disabled to avoid false virus alerts'
scripts.build:all: node scripts/sync-version.js && pnpm build:client && pnpm build:go && pnpm build:upx
scripts.release: pnpm build:all && echo '打包完成！请手动上传 out 目录下的文件到 GitHub Release。'
